title: Chapter 21
content:
Chapter 21: Chapter 21: New Mission

Damon fell into step between the two sisters, their hips swaying in unison as they guided him along winding stone paths bordered by blooming spirit flowers.

Mia glanced back, a faint flush on her cheeks. "The Sect Leader recognizes your potential in the test. Your age, cultivation, peak mortal spiritual roots, and even your sword qi. That’s the sort of thing you only see in true prodigies."

’Prodigy. A real acknowledgement without any flattery on it.’

Damon kept his expression neutral, his gaze drifting to the slits in their robes where pale thighs caught the light with every step.

"So, senior sister, how large is this Sect exactly?"

Mao spoke freely as she walked. "If you mean total territory, the entire mountain range belongs to us, that also include Azure Cloud City. As for the sect area alone are somewhere around a hundred thousand square kilometers, I think."

"A hundred thousand square kilometers?" Damon’s eyes widened slightly, glancing around only to realize that despite how far they’d walked, the mountain had barely drawn any nearer.

"There are more than ten thousand disciples, along with dedicated zones for cultivation, combat, and even hunting. Though I wouldn’t look too stunned just yet," Mao laughed, as they finally arrived at a villa that place on the cliffside.

Mao pushed the doors open. "Welcome to your new home."

As Damon stepped through the doors, cool air from the cliff brushing his face.

Mao grinned, sweeping her arm wide. "This villa’s yours until you become an inner disciple, junior brother. Private formations block intruders, and the spring boosts cultivation by thirty percent. Golden token perks include the best access to sect resources like pills or manuals."

Mia nodded, cheeks pink as she fiddled with her sleeve. "It’s stocked with the basic necessities already. Bedding, robes, and even a transmission jade. If you need anything, just call."

’Well, it’s not that I really need it, but it will be good for Ariel.’

Damon scanned the sisters’ curves again, slits in their robes teasing pale skin. "Impressive setup, senior sisters. You two must pull strings for newbies like me."

Mao laughed, but she shook her head. "Well, it’s the sect leader’s order. Usually, the sect won’t give this much just for the golden token, but with your potential, the sect leader has high expectations for you, and I believe you’ll climb fast."

"Expectation?"

"Let’s sit down first." She led Damon to the living room. And once the sit down, Mao began to explain.

"You know, there is a tournament of eastern continent every five years. It decides for who the best sect is in the Eastern continent. The requirement is that one must be under 25 and in the Earth Spirit Realm."

"I see, so the sect leader expects me to join that tournament..."

"Yes, and we also participated in it this year. So, I believe you can reach the Earth Spirit Realm in 6 years."

’6 Years? With my system, I can do it in a few months, especially if you two helps me, hehehe.’

He looks at Mao and Mia with a lustful gaze.

"When is the tournament this year?" Damon asks.

"In 8 months by the end of the year," Mia answers shyly.

’I see... that’s why they said even if I don’t get the golden token, I will get the same benefits.’

"Okay, I got it, I’ll try my best. Then, how about my senior sister give me a tour?"

Mao stood, her robe hugging her hips as she smiled. "A tour it is, junior brother. Follow us."

Mia trailed close, purple hair swaying, her gaze flicking to Damon’s chest.

’These sisters move like they’re already hooked by my Incubus Aura.’

They stepped into the training dojo first, mats gleaming under spirit lamps. Mao swung a practice blade, slicing air with a whoosh.

"You can train here without limits. The array restores your stamina fast."

Damon gripped a wooden sword from his waist. "Please guide my hand, senior sister. There’s much I could stand to learn from you."

She flushed, demonstrating a fluid arc that brushed his arm. Mia watched, biting her lip.

[Mio’s Interest increased by 50 points, +100 lust points!]

[Mia’s Interest increased by 70 points, +140 lust points!]

[Mio’s Interest reaches 100/100, new relationship level unlocked, +200 lust points!]

[Mia’s Interest reaches 100/100, new relationship level unlocked, +200 lust points!]

[Mio’s Relationship change from Stranger to Acquaintance, +300 lust points!]

[Mia’s Relationship change from Stranger to Acquaintance, +300 lust points!]

Next, the alchemy room, shelves crammed with glowing herbs. Mia pointed shyly. "You can make pills here. But the Sect will supply ones if you can’t do alchemy."

Damon leaned in, inhaling her floral scent. "You two know your way around herbs? Bet you could mix something... invigorating."

Mio’s eyes sparkled. "Careful what you wish for. You might not be able to handle us, hehehe."

They reached the bedroom last, a massive bed draped in silk, spirit spring mist curling from an attached bath. Mia fiddled with a towel. "This is the bath, it can heal wounds."

Damon’s gaze lingered on their slits, skin glowing. He heard a system ding.

[Ding!]

[Mission: Raise the relationship of the Nightrider Sisters to Taking an interest.]

[Reward: 50000 Lust Points.]

[Time Limit: Before they leave your villa.]

’A new mission? This time no penalty, huh... Well, why not?’

"Thank you, Senior sister, for the tour. As a thanks, how about I give you a massage?" Damon offers them.

"Massage? Sure, why not?" Mio said yes without knowing anything.

Meanwhile, Mia’s face becomes more red. Mia just nods, but internally

’Massage? He is going to touch me. Oh yes!’

"Then, go lie on the bed. Who’s going first?"

Mia was about to open her mouth, but Mio cut her off.

"Of course it will be me, I’m the big sister here," as she jumped onto the bed and lay on her stomach.

"Haah..." Mia, knowing her sister’s personality, just gave up, waiting for her turn. Then she moved toward the chair near the bed.

Damon watched the two of them with quiet amusement. Their dynamic was really entertaining.

One with a bubbly and pushy airhead playing the elder sister role, while the other sharp and reserved, being more mature than her big sister ever been.
